englishDefinitions: To put padding (like tissues) inside a bra to make the breasts appear larger.
persianTranslation: توی سوتین را پر کردن (برای بزرگتر نشان دادن)
examples: Many teenagers stuff their bras when they are feeling insecure about their bodies.
She admitted that she used to stuff her bra with socks in high school.
You can tell she's stuffing her bra because it looks unnatural.
